title: Add status filtering to tasks API
description: Add a status query parameter to GET /api/tasks for draft, review, and published tasks, preserving existing difficulty filtering and combining both filters when present.
repo_context: Next.js 16 App Router benchmark application. Tasks API lives in app/api/tasks/route.ts and API route tests live in tests/app/api/routes.test.ts.
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/tasks supports a status query parameter for draft, review, and published
Invalid status values are ignored, matching current difficulty-filter behavior
Existing difficulty filtering continues to work
status and difficulty filters combine correctly when both are provided
API route unit tests cover status filtering, invalid status handling, and combined difficulty+status filtering

structured_rubric.label: Functional correctness
structured_rubric.description: The API satisfies the requested filtering behavior

structured_rubric.label: Integration quality
structured_rubric.description: The change follows existing route and test patterns

structured_rubric.label: Regression safety
structured_rubric.description: Targeted tests, lint, and build pass

structured_rubric.label: Minimality
structured_rubric.description: The diff is tightly scoped to the task

structured_rubric.label: Process quality
structured_rubric.description: The agent follows repo instructions and records useful verification evidence
